personal.name: Jesus Antonio Padres Parada
personal.title: Full-Stack Software Engineer & Founder
personal.bio: Full-Stack Software Engineer with 3+ years of enterprise SaaS experience at Qualtrics and a founder's lens on product. I bridge business problems and AI-powered solutions — from discovery and system design to scalable production apps with CI/CD, automated testing, and cross-functional delivery.

experience.title: Founder / Full-Stack Software Engineer
experience.summary: AI automation and custom software for service businesses. Sole operator across product, full-stack development, AI integration, QA, and delivery.
highlights: Founded an AI automation and custom software company serving 7+ verticals (home services, property management, dental, legal, auto, salons, landscaping)

Shipped TaskLine (React, TypeScript, PostgreSQL, Tailwind) — a full-stack client management portal with AI-generated proposals, invoicing, job tracking, scheduling, SMS/email follow-ups, and a client portal
Built AI workflow automations including missed-call text-backs, automated proposal generation, invoice follow-ups, and appointment booking — using Claude API, OpenAI, and Twilio
Developed a Voice AI receptionist that answers calls, books appointments, and follows up with clients 24/7 in English and Spanish
Engineered a zero-touch lead gen pipeline that scrapes, scores, enriches, and deduplicates 1,000+ prospects into a tiered CRM

details.description: Founded Solvr Labs to help service businesses leverage AI and custom software to grow without growing headcount. Sole operator across product strategy, full-stack development, AI integration, QA, and client delivery.
responsibilities: Lead client discovery, scoping, and system design
Build full-stack web apps (React/Next.js + PostgreSQL/Supabase) with AI integrations
Design and deploy Voice AI agents and SMS/email automation flows
Operate a self-built lead gen pipeline that fills the top of funnel without manual prospecting
Own QA, deployment, monitoring, and post-launch support
achievements: Shipped TaskLine to production with iOS/Android apps and live customers
Operating a fully automated outbound pipeline (1,000+ prospects scored and tiered)
Reusable agent + automation frameworks across 7+ service-business verticals

experience.title: Software Engineer

Led Agile/Scrum sprint ceremonies, conducted code reviews, and resolved production incidents while maintaining 99.9% uptime
Specialized in end-to-end testing driven by real user behavior — catching edge-case bugs by asserting on outcomes, not just UI interactions

details.description: Worked on Qualtrics' Experience Management platform, building features for survey, analytics, and feedback products used by Fortune 500 customers.
responsibilities: Develop new full-stack features across Java, Python, JavaScript, and SQL
Maintain and optimize existing codebase for performance and reliability
Write comprehensive unit, integration, and E2E tests

achievements: Improved test automation efficiency by 95% and reduced regression bugs by 40%
Maintained 99.9% production uptime across owned services
Contributed to a platform serving millions of survey responses

experience.title: Computer Science Tutor

highlights: Mentored 50+ students in data structures, algorithms, and software debugging using Java, Python, and C
Guided learners in debugging and testing strategies to strengthen independent problem-solving skills

Help students debug code and understand error messages

details.description: Strong foundation across multiple paradigms with production experience.
Modern, accessible, performant interfaces — from marketing sites to full SaaS apps.
Production APIs, auth, and data layers — Postgres-first with Supabase or self-hosted.
LLM-powered features in production — voice agents, RAG, prompt-engineered workflows.
Reliable delivery: pipelines, containers, and cloud platforms across the dev → prod cycle.
Comprehensive testing strategies — assert on outcomes, not implementation details.

projects.title: TaskLine
projects.summary: Free freelancer OS with an AI receptionist that pays for itself. Projects, tasks, clients, invoicing, scheduling, payments — plus optional Voice AI that answers calls and books jobs 24/7.

details.description: TaskLine is a complete back-office for tradespeople and service freelancers — projects, tasks, clients, invoicing, calendar, scheduling, payments. The optional AI suite (Radar) answers your phone, analyzes incoming requests, drafts quotes, and helps you talk to clients. Free platform; commission-based AI.
features: AI-answered phone line (Retell AI + Twilio) that books appointments 24/7
Voice-first in-app assistant — dictate quotes and invoices hands-free
Bilingual end-to-end (English + Spanish LATAM) across UI, email, SMS, and AI
Email + SMS as first-class channels with A2P 10DLC compliance
Stripe Connect direct-deposit payments with no middleman
iOS and Android apps (live in App Store and Google Play)
details.impact: Eliminates lost leads from missed calls and email chaos for solo trades and small service teams. Free platform with commission only on AI-sourced jobs.
details.role: Sole developer — product, architecture, full-stack delivery, mobile apps, AI integration, payments, deployment.

projects.title: Solvr Labs
projects.summary: AI automation and custom software for service businesses across 7+ verticals. Voice AI receptionists, AI workflow automation, custom SaaS, and a zero-touch lead gen pipeline.

details.description: Solvr Labs builds AI systems for businesses that don't have a tech team — home services, property management, dental, legal, auto, salons, landscaping. Pragmatic ROI framing, founder-led, no fluff.
features: AI workflow automation (missed-call text-backs, proposals, invoice follow-ups, booking)
Voice AI receptionist (24/7 answering, scheduling, lead capture)
Custom AI software with embedded LLM features
Self-built outbound pipeline scoring 1,000+ prospects into tiered CRM
details.impact: Helps service businesses recover lost revenue from missed leads while operating leaner.
details.role: Founder and sole operator across product, engineering, AI, QA, and delivery.

projects.title: Enterprise Test Automation Framework
projects.summary: Selenium + JUnit suite that improved test efficiency by 95% and reduced regression bugs by 40% across enterprise survey, analytics, and feedback products.

details.description: Designed and implemented a comprehensive end-to-end test automation framework for Qualtrics' Experience Management platform. Specialized in tests driven by real user behavior — asserting on outcomes, not just UI interactions.
features: Page Object Model architecture for maintainability
Parallel test execution for faster feedback
Integration with Jenkins CI/CD and Docker
details.impact: Reduced manual testing time by 95% and regression bugs by 40%. Enabled faster release cycles and higher confidence in deployments.
details.role: Lead developer responsible for architecture, implementation, and team training.

projects.title: MealMaster
projects.summary: Meal planning and recipe discovery app with weekly calendar, saved recipes, and smart search powered by Spoonacular.

details.description: A modern meal planning application built as a 12-week full-stack project — Spoonacular-powered recipe search, personal collections, and weekly meal planning with a brutalist UI.
features: Smart recipe search with detailed nutrition and cooking info
JWT-based auth with secure password hashing
Weekly meal planner with drag-and-drop scheduling
details.impact: Demonstrates full-stack delivery — React frontend, FastAPI backend, third-party API integration, and clean auth flow.
details.role: Sole developer — frontend, backend, database, and API integration.
